## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Start FormicOS with `...`
2. Navigate to `...`
3. Perform `...`
4. Observe `...`

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, logs, or screenshots if
available.

## Environment

- **OS**: (e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14, Windows 11)
- **Python version**: (e.g., 3.12.3)
- **Docker version** (if applicable):
- **Browser** (if frontend issue):
- **LLM backend**: (local llama.cpp / Anthropic / Gemini)

## Affected Layer

Which architectural layer is affected (if known):

- [ ] Core (types, events)
- [ ] Engine (colony execution)
- [ ] Adapters (LLM, SQLite, Qdrant)
- [ ] Surface (HTTP, WebSocket, Queen)
- [ ] Frontend (Lit components)
- [ ] Docker / deployment

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem.
